entities.name: BIBLIOMETRIC INVESTIGATIONS
entities.description: Systematic investigations used to evaluate and compare the scientific impact of publications.

entities.name: SOIL EROSION MODELLING
entities.description: The application of mathematical models to simulate and analyze soil erosion processes.

entities.name: SCOPUS DATABASE
entities.description: A comprehensive bibliographic database used for indexing and retrieving scientific documents.

entities.name: BOOSTED REGRESSION TREE MODEL
entities.description: A machine learning algorithm used to detect the relative impact of meta-information on citations.

entities.name: VOSVIEWER SOFTWARE
entities.description: Software used for constructing and visualizing bibliometric networks.

entities.name: WATEM/SEDEM MODEL
entities.description: A specific soil erosion model used in research.

entities.name: USLE
entities.description: The Universal Soil Loss Equation, a specific soil erosion model.

entities.name: MODEL CALIBRATION
entities.description: The process of adjusting model parameters to match observed data.

entities.name: VALIDATION
entities.description: The process of testing a model's accuracy against independent data.

entities.name: FIELD ACTIVITY
entities.description: Activities conducted in the field as part of erosion modelling studies.

entities.name: CITATIONS
entities.description: The number of times a publication is referenced by other works.

entities.name: CO-CITATION
entities.description: A bibliometric analysis where two documents are cited together by a third document.

entities.name: BIBLIOGRAPHIC COUPLING
entities.description: A bibliometric analysis where two documents cite the same third document.

entities.name: CO-AUTHORSHIP NETWORKS
entities.description: Networks representing collaborations between authors of scientific publications.
